title: lycopersicon pimpinellifolium var. intermedium
intro: Lycopersicon pimpinellifolium var. intermedium, also known as the wild tomato, is a perennial plant that belongs to the nightshade family and is a variant of the wild tomato species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of flavonoids and carotenoids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lycopersicon pimpinellifolium var. intermedium include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as supporting cardiovascular health and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
